lifetime.name: Lifetime Plan
lifetime.description: Create your professional portfolio, generate your CV, and keep it online forever.

payment.portfolioVisible: Your portfolio is currently visible to visitors with full lifetime access.
payment.cancelWarning: Are you absolutely sure you want to cancel your payment? Your portfolio will no longer be visible to visitors once your current cycle ends.
payment.processingPayment: Processing payment, please don't close the page...
payment.processingDescription: Securely confirming your payment with the payment gateway. This process takes a few seconds.
payment.processingWarning: ⚠️ Please do not close this page or go back to avoid payment issues.
payment.unexpectedError: An error occurred while saving the payment.

errors.unauthorized: You must be logged in to complete payment.
errors.alreadyPaid: You already have an active lifetime payment.
errors.orderAlreadyProcessed: This payment has already been processed. Contact support if you think this is a mistake.
errors.paypalCaptureFailed: Payment could not be captured. It may have already been processed. Please contact support.
errors.paypalAuthFailed: Payment gateway authentication failed. Please contact support.
errors.paypalGatewayError: Could not connect to the payment gateway. Please try again later.
errors.paymentNotCompleted: Payment was not completed. Please try again.

errors.invalidPaymentAmount: Invalid payment amount. Please contact support.
errors.serverUnreachable: Cannot connect to the server. Please try again later.
errors.serverError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or contact support.
